keys.value: {"id":"foreign_trade_v1","name":"外贸出口履约流程 (Foreign Trade Export)","status":"ACTIVE","transitions":[],"createdAt":1773307706171,"updatedAt":1774406364546,"states":["DRAFT","DEPOSIT_PENDING","DEPOSIT_CONFIRMED","SOURCING","PACKING","SHIPPED","AFTER_SALES","ON_HOLD","CANCELLED"],"state_meta":{"DRAFT":{"label":{"zh":"草稿","en":"Draft"},"description":{"zh":"起单未确认，尚未发给客户","en":"Order created but not yet confirmed"}},"DEPOSIT_PENDING":{"label":{"zh":"待付订金","en":"Deposit Pending"},"description":{"zh":"已报价，等待客户支付订金","en":"Quotation sent, awaiting deposit payment"}},"DEPOSIT_CONFIRMED":{"label":{"zh":"已付订金","en":"Deposit Confirmed"},"description":{"zh":"订金到账，订单正式生效","en":"Deposit received, order confirmed"}},"SOURCING":{"label":{"zh":"备货","en":"Sourcing"},"description":{"zh":"采购或安排生产中","en":"Procurement or production in progress"}},"PACKING":{"label":{"zh":"组货","en":"Packing"},"description":{"zh":"货物整合打包，准备出运","en":"Goods consolidated and packed for shipment"}},"SHIPPED":{"label":{"zh":"发货","en":"Shipped"},"description":{"zh":"货物已出运，在途中","en":"Goods dispatched and in transit"}},"AFTER_SALES":{"label":{"zh":"售后","en":"After Sales"},"description":{"zh":"到货后问题跟进处理","en":"Post-delivery follow-up and issue handling"}},"ON_HOLD":{"label":{"zh":"暂停","en":"On Hold"},"description":{"zh":"人工挂起，等待外部条件","en":"Manually suspended, awaiting external conditions"}},"CANCELLED":{"label":{"zh":"已取消","en":"Cancelled"},"description":{"zh":"订单已取消","en":"Order has been cancelled"}}},"description":"管理订单确认后的完整过程","meta_fields":[],"state_config":{},"ai_hooks":[],"sequential":true}
